summary: Added Justfile prerequisite check to run-e2e-tests SKILL.md. The Prerequisites section now includes a row for 'Justfile with e2e-setup recipe' and a bash check that verifies the Justfile exists and contains the e2e-setup recipe, with a prompt to run /init-justfile if missing.
keyDecisions: Added Justfile existence and e2e-setup recipe check before other prerequisite checks so users are directed to /init-justfile early in the workflow

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Prerequisites section references Justfile existence check
Prerequisites section references e2e-setup recipe check
User is prompted to run /init-justfile when Justfile or e2e-setup recipe is missing
